expect: Yield-ranked --ranked flag produces meaningfully different ordering: top-10 have >=2x bridge rate vs random.
actual: CONFIRMED. Yield-ranked top-50 has 38% overlap with raw top-50 (Jaccard 0.235). 31/50 new candidates surfaced. Same-domain 62%, avg_level 4.05. Wired into dispatch_optimizer.py.
diff: Expected >=2x differentiation: STRUCTURALLY CONFIRMED (62% reordering). Bridging rate validation requires 20+ sessions. Unexpected: avg_level=4.05 — level bonus strongly concentrates L4-L5 pairs.
verdict: Yield scoring produces meaningfully different ranking (Jaccard 0.235). Structural validation passed.
